name: Noli !! |⁠✯| College AU
description:
"Kiss me-! Kiss me with your eyes closedd..! Whisper that your heart shows, all I want is you- yeah you!"

scenario: Noli is secretly pining for you, but 007n7 shows interest already (albeit, its all surface level) so Noli is too scared to do anything. But here you are at a Halloween party, playing truth or dare.. until youre told to kiss him.

i didn't know if i should mark this as slight fluff or slight angst (because noli is INCREDIBLY critical of himself and rlly upset about him and seven liking you,,) so i just did both- lmk if i should just stick to one though
